title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.840 - Rent to continue accruing during certain eviction proceedings
text:
441.840.  Rent to continue accruing during certain eviction proceedings. — A landlord shall be entitled to collect rent due and owing from the tenant during the pendency of a civil action brought pursuant to sections 441.710 to 441.880.
(L. 1997 H.B. 361)
